item.title: PIONEER SX 3800 stereo receiver - $300
item.description: This receiver is functional and sounds good but there are some signs of wear from use / the pre-out & main-in jumpers are missing. it has a partial LED upgrade(the tuner section) additional LED & incandescent lamps pictured are included. This unit presents well for its age, it's a very nice piece by pioneer

item.title: MARANTZ 2275 stereo receiver - $1,100
item.description: This receiver is functional & sounds good but there are some signs of wear from use/ The tuner string is loose & struggles to move the needle, new tuner string & new vellum paper included. The pre-in and main out RCAs are loose and need attention. The FM, stereo & Dolby indicator lamps need to be replaced. the the pre-out & main-in jumpers are missing. it has a partial LED upgrade, (tuning & signal gauges as well as the tuner lamps) This unit presents well for its age, it's a very nice piece by Marantz.

item.title: Pioneer Vintage SX-727 Stereo Receiver - $550 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage (1972-1974) Pioneer Stereo Receiver

item.title: Kenwood Vintage KR-3030 Stereo Receiver - $250 (Warwick)
item.description: Vintage Kenwood KR-3030 Stereo Receiver Made

item.title: Stereo receiver - Pyle PT 390AU - $150 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: new. still in original box. used only once.

item.title: SCOTT 1960s Stereo/Turntable - $250 (Seekonk)
item.description: SCOTT Solid State Stereo Receiver/Turntable.

item.title: Pioneer SX-6 System - $300 (Warwick)
item.description: Complete package

item.title: Vintage multi-function stereo system - $40 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Fisher stereo system: AM/FM tuner (works great!). turntable (not tested). 8-track (not tested). cassette player (not tested).

item.title: Sherwood RA-1145R stereo - $75 (Warwick)
item.description: Sherwood RA-1145R

item.title: Polk Audio T50 Slim Tower Stereo Speakers - $160 (Cranston)
item.description: Fantastic pair of Polk Audio T50 stereo speakers. Someone bought these and never used them so they are in excellent condition. Sleek design and a small footprint. Sound fantastic - crisp highs and full bass sound. These are a current model and sell for $250 each. I can demo them in my garage. Great deal on awesome speakers for $160 firm.

item.title: Sansui D-X311WR Auto-Reverse Dual Cassette Deck - $59 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Sansui D-X311WR auto-reverse dual cassette deck. Has Dolby B&C noise reduction and an MPX filter. Very nice condition. Works and is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Cool blast from the past for $59 firm.

item.title: Mirage M-290 Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $75 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice pair of Mirage M-290 two way bookshelf stereo speakers. Very good sounding speakers. Good condition. grills included. Bi-wireable. Jumpers included for regular wiring. They are hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great speakers for $75 firm.

item.title: I Buy Vintage Stereo Equipment - Receivers, Speakers Etc... - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: I like to buy, tinker with and collect vintage stereo equipment. I like old receivers, speakers, turntables, tape decks, cd players etc... I'll even buy some broken stuff (depending what it is). Let me know what you have and where it is located. You can email me through craigslist or call or text the phone number that comes up when you click "reply" at the top left corner of my ad. Thanks, Bill

item.title: RCA (Radio Shack) CAT# 40-5003 Compact Stereo Speakers - $40 (Cranston)
item.description: Great pair of RCA stereo speakers which were sold by Radio Shack back in the day. The cabinets and grills are metal and they are fairly heavy. They sound great for the small size and are in excellent condition. They were catalog # 40-5003. They are hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Cool speakers for $40 firm.

item.title: Polk Audio T15 Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $50 (Cranston)
item.description: Height 10.63" (27 cm)

item.title: Vintage Technics cassette deck player - $30 (Westerly ri)
item.description: From estate I bought

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Denon Receiver - $200
item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.title: SON OF AMPZILLA stereo power amplifier - $350
item.description: This power amplifier belonged to the estate of the celebrity Shirley Jones (The Partridge family) A few years back I purchased it from the person who originally purchased it from the Shirley Jones estate sale. (Please see attached pic of the original FB market listing, the serial number is indicated) the amp is functional and sounds good but there are some signs of wear from use. The lamps were replaced with warm white LEDs, blue LEDs included.

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set wih Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $400 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me

item.description: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player

item.description: technics amp, 350 watt, model SU-V75 ( 17"Wx8.75"Dx3.75"H ), stereo receiver, 9 watt, model ST-S74 ( 17"Wx5"Dx1.75"H ) with two WIRED boston acoustics CR 75 bookshelf speakers (can be wall mounted) ( 7.75"Wx10"Dx12"H )

item.title: Turntable to transfer vinyl to USB price reduced - $30 (Tiverton)
item.description: Brand new with built in speakers

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.description: Great little audiophile quality pre-amp. USB interface for powered desktop speakers or powered stereo system. Specs can be found online, perfect condition unit includes original box, manual, packaging, dust cover, original remote, and cables.

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.description: 1959 Magnavox concert grand. This was electronically restored before I bought it six years ago. Sounds absolutely incredible. The turntable will need some work. Currently stuck on one speed and manual.

item.title: Mackie 16 Chanel mixing board - $200 (North kingstown)
item.description: Mackie mixer in great condition . Everything works. Also available hard case , rack mount compressor, and stereo equalizer.

item.title: Shure BLX4R Wireless system W/ Two SM35 Headset Mics - $349 (providence)
item.description: Great condition Shure BLX4R Wireless System.Comes with 2 Shure SM35 Head-set Mics. One the side cracked I taped it but bought a new one ($110.00) Both are included. It was Always racked so there is some scratches on the receiver from mounting it in the rack. but it was Never abused. Works 100% and comes with All original parts and original Packing.

item.title: Apple iMac 21.5-inch Intel Core i5-3330S quad 2.7Ghz 8GB RAM 1TB HDD - $150 (Cranston)
item.description: 2012 Apple iMac 21.5-inch Intel Core i5-3330S Quad Core 2.7Ghz 8GB RAM 1TB HDD

item.title: Matrix GT800FX - Black - $700 (West Haven)
item.description: The GT800FX is a lightweight 1U format stereo rack mount power amplifier designed specifically for use by guitarists. Whether you're using modelers such as Fractal Audio's Axe For the Kemper Profiling Amp or Line 6 or just needing a traditional "slave" amplifier, the GT800FX gives you 2 channels of 400W class AB power. In bridged mode it delivers a huge 800W into 8 ohms

item.title: Sony Speakers - $20 (Bristol)
item.description: Two Sony speakers

item.title: MAGNAVOX STEREO CONSOLE RECORD PLAYER - $100 (West Warwick)
item.description: USED IT FOR QUITE A WHILE LOVE THE ALBUM SOUND OF MUSIC.

item.title: Bose Wave music system awrcc2 With Remote. - $180
item.description: The Bose Wave music system AWRCC2 is a compact and shelf stereo that delivers high-quality sound in a sleek design. With its remote control, users can easily adjust the settings and navigate through their music collection. The brand Bose is known for its superior audio performance, making this home audio system a popular choice for those looking to enhance their listening experience. Perfect for small spaces or as a secondary music system, the Bose Wave AWRCC2 offers a convenient and stylish addition to any home.

item.title: Huge yard sale Sat and Sun 7/12 & 7/13 8-1 (Smithfield)
item.description: Lots of stuff old and new including tools, golf clubs, bikes, knick knacks, small furniture, camping stuff, clothes, framed paintings and posters, high end speakers, receiver and subwoofers, lamps, costume jewelry, sports stuff (baseball and hockey mostly)and so much more!! Come on by and take a look No early birds please. 8-1

item.title: Tempus Radio Controlled Wall Clock - $25 (Seekonk)
item.description: Built-in receiver synchronizes to the government radio time signal.

item.title: Garmin eTrex HC Series GPS Trail Navigation Device with all its extras - $25 (Providence, RI)
item.description: The Garmin eTrex Venture HC is a handheld GPS navigator with a high-sensitivity GPS receiver, a 2.2-inch, 256-color screen, and 24MB of internal memory. It also includes a basemap, geocaching capabilities, and supports a variety of optional maps.

item.title: Andy Timmons HALO Dual Echo/Delay Pedal - $125 (Westerly)
item.description: This item is in excellent condition and sells for $299 new, so this is a great price. This is an AMAZING delay unit from Keeley artist Andy Timmons.

item.title: Pro Pride 3P Anti Sway Hitch - $2,400 (Wakefield)
item.description: Pro Pride anti sway hitch. The best weight distribution and anti-sway hitch available. Lightly used and like new. Three trips to the truck scale, a total of 106 miles. Bought a smaller truck and camper so no longer needed. Fits 2" receiver, has 1000 lb weight distribution bars. For trailer ball size 2-5/16". Complete, everything is there except the original shipping boxes. Instructions, wrenches, installation book and all the parts. Also includes the embroidered Pro Pride 3 piece cover set. Hitch worked great but my smaller truck and camper are too light for this hitch. $2400 cash only. Absolutely no shipping. Must be picked up.

item.title: AKG Perception wireless 45 instrumental set - $70 (swansea)
item.description: Original owner, used only twice, ended up I didn't need it.

item.title: Fargen diagonal 2x12 cab with great speakers - $500 (North Providence)
item.description: Fargen oval open-back diagonal 2x12 cabinet in a sweet orange tolex with some fun fading patterns on it. Includes a WGS ET65 speaker in the bottom (American voicing with great low-mids) and Celestion Neo Creamback in the top (greenback-style upper mids and keeps the cabinet very light). Plug & play jack so you can run each 8 ohm speaker separately in stereo or both speakers in series (16 ohm) or in parallel (4 ohm).

item.title: Garmin Tacx Neo 2T Smart Trainer - $650 (Portsmouth)
item.description: Tacx Neo indoor trainer in great condition. Purchased new in 2021. 1000km ridden. Campagnolo or Shimano free hub body available and 11 speed or 12 speed (11-30) Cassette

item.description: Garmin GPS XL receiver. Used. Excellent condition. Needs power cord.

item.description: Great planes corsair radio control airplane receiver ready uses 2200 lipo battery has plug in landing gear never used.

item.title: Radio control airplane - $75 (Tiverton)
item.description: This is a radio control airplane. Receiver ready never used . Made for 22 lipo battery , not included Local pick up only.

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $80 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.title: Pair of vintage Polk Audio S10 floor speakers and single Boston Accoustics A4 II - $120 (Middletown)
item.description: Free Bird!

item.title: Receivers (Providence RI)
item.description: Receivers collectable on sale in Music House of Flea Market big Top, reasonable price.

item.title: Annual Multi Family Yard Sale Saturday & Sunday Matunuck (Shelldrake)
item.description: Annual, multi family, yard sale Shelldrake Rd Matunuck July 12th & 13th 8am-2pm. Lots of vintage 80s/90s, men's and women's clothing and shoes, new old stock with tags, record albums, cassettes, golf clubs and balls, Knick knacks, vintage kitchen items, totes that haven't been opened and more! Listing this sale for a friend.

item.title: Bote Rackman Aero inflatable paddle board - $1,100 (warwick)
item.description: Bote Rackman Aero Apex PD native fusion inflatable paddle board 12'4" x 38"x 7" . Brand new still in box. This is a quality board and sells for $1800. I won it at a golf tournament late fall 2024 and now selling this coming water season.

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $16,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.title: Reloop RP-8000 MK2 Turntable w/ Reloop Elite Mixer - $1,999 (Providence)
item.description: (2) Reloop RP-8000 MK2 Advanced Hybrid DJ Turntable Instrument (Brand new in original box)
